task_title: My search misses something I can eyeball in the list

scores.justification: The agent explicitly identified case-sensitivity as the cause in message[1], stating 'This is a classic case-sensitivity issue. By default, `ctl search` is **case-sensitive**' and demonstrated this by running searches with different cases.
The agent re-ran the search with the `--i` flag in message[1] (call_d29682558b5e482a9ad06d4b: `./cli/bin/ctl search --query "pro" --scope products --i`) and again in message[9] and message[21].

While the agent ran the `--i` search multiple times, all results returned empty arrays for the products scope, and the final answer acknowledges that 'none of the 80 product names actually contain "pro" or "Pro"', so no matching product id/name was shown from the --i run.
